review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging and monitoring, which are essential for correlating monitoring information. However, minor naming adjustments were made to improve clarity and consistency with the existing naming conventions. The functions accurately reflect the capabilities of Kubernetes audit logging and admission controllers.
naming_improvements: Use 'configured' instead of 'enabled' to better reflect the setup nature of audit logging and correlation
title: System Monitoring | Correlate Monitoring Information
step1_reasoning: The control SI-4 (16) focuses on system monitoring and correlating monitoring information. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to audit logging capabilities that capture and correlate events across the cluster. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture detailed metadata and be integrated with external systems for correlation. Admission controllers can also be configured to log events, providing additional data points for monitoring and correlation.
